name: 示例文本处理器
description: 一个简单的文本处理插件示例，用于演示插件系统的功能
author: AIO Hub Team

methods.name: toUpperCase
methods.example: await execute({ service: 'example-text-processor', method: 'toUpperCase', params: { text: 'hello' } })

methods.name: toLowerCase
methods.example: await execute({ service: 'example-text-processor', method: 'toLowerCase', params: { text: 'HELLO' } })

methods.name: reverse
methods.example: await execute({ service: 'example-text-processor', method: 'reverse', params: { text: 'hello' } })

methods.name: countWords
methods.example: await execute({ service: 'example-text-processor', method: 'countWords', params: { text: 'hello world' } })

methods.name: applyDefaultCase
methods.description: 根据配置应用默认大小写转换
methods.example: await execute({ service: 'example-text-processor', method: 'applyDefaultCase', params: { text: 'Hello World' } })

prefix.label: 文本前缀
prefix.description: 处理文本时自动添加的前缀

suffix.label: 文本后缀
suffix.description: 处理文本时自动添加的后缀

enablePrefix.label: 启用前缀/后缀
enablePrefix.description: 是否在处理文本时应用前缀和后缀

defaultCase.label: 默认大小写
defaultCase.description: 默认的大小写转换方式
